description_long: This is a highly stylized double-headed axe with ornate, jagged purple blades featuring gold decorative patterns and silver spikes protruding from each side. The central section of the axe head is adorned with a faceted, gem-like pink ornament, giving it a regal and fantasy-inspired appearance. The handle is straight, made of dark wood, and is accented with gold rings and a rounded pommel at the base. Two purple and gold banners hang from the lower part of each blade, adding to the decorative flair. The overall design suggests a ceremonial or fantasy weapon rather than a utilitarian tool. The craftsmanship and color palette make it stand out as a unique and eye-catching object in any urban or fantasy-themed environment.
description: A decorative double-headed axe with jagged purple blades, gold accents, and a gem-like pink centerpiece, featuring a straight wooden handle and hanging banners.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the axe head and the symmetry of the double blades.
description_view_1: Front three-quarter view highlighting the ornate blade designs, pink gem centerpiece, and hanging banners.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the blade thickness and the alignment of the handle.
description_view_3: Rear three-quarter view displaying the back of the blades, the gem, and the banners from a different angle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical wooden handle with gold ring accents and a rounded pommel, designed for a firm grip.
attribute_blade_design: Double-headed, jagged-edged blades with ornate gold patterns, silver spikes, and a central pink gem; decorative banners hang from each blade.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with decorative central gem and reinforced by metal fittings.
